commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Mamuchan. Old Vulgate, "Mardochæus. "Yet the Jews say this was the infamous Aman; and one Greek copy has Bilgaios, (Calmet) and Arabo, "Mouchaios "chap. iii. 1., and xii. 6. He was the youngest, but spoke first, as was sometimes the case.
